author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 02 - February/Days 046-052 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Discover Love That Sends You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Listen before you move today; the Father's love sends beloved children with His voice.
edits.reason: Keeps the Deuteronomy 6:3 hear-and-keep lens active before action.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Receive Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Carry one word of God close today; mercy forms the heart before it shows on the outside.
edits.reason: Connects covenant mercy to God's words settling on the heart.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Trust the Father's Welcome into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Name the fear without bowing to it; the Father's welcome can steady the next step.
edits.reason: Preserves honest fear and courage rooted in beloved identity.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Hope Rise Beloved Identity into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Draw one clean boundary with a rival allegiance today, while keeping tenderness toward people.
edits.reason: Keeps the ancient covenant-boundary guardrail from becoming contempt toward persons.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Carry Love That Finds You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Walk into the small place with dignity today; the Father's love is not measuring your size.
edits.reason: Turns loved-before-impressive identity into a practical answer to comparison.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Lean Into Grace Before Striving into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let rescue start the song today; strength is received before it is displayed.
edits.reason: Preserves Exodus 15 worship from rescue rather than performance.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry See Again Mercy in the Morning into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Bring the bitter place to the Father this morning; mercy can meet you before it makes sense.
edits.reason: Keeps the Marah image honest while refusing to let bitterness have the final word.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
